title: Lawrence's Ambient Fireflies
description: A very light Mod/Datapack that adds fireflies as ambient particles to the Swamp and Mangrove Swamp
body:
![Ambient Fireflies next to a Witch Hut in the Swamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4445fc53c8623ae8f429a06225954281dbe135e4_0.webp)
A small and very lightweight pack that adds fireflies as ambient particles to the Swamp and Mangrove biomes.

It'll work with most other datapacks? It for sure won't work with any other mods/datapacks that directly change swamps/mangrove swamps directly so just keep that in mind.

Will not work on Realms
